name: Pmet Resources Inc.
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$0.6640. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$0.6601 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$0.6640, stop A$0.5197, target A$0.7050. Risk/reward is 0.28:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
